data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhanced account security via secondary authentication.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures privacy through encryption of data in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for encryption in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Account Takeover Protection
data.description: Prevention measures against unauthorized account access.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models detect and block suspicious logins.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Incentivizes discovery of security vulnerabilities by external researchers.
data.technical_spec: Managed through a platform like HackerOne.

data.title: SOC Monitoring
data.description: 24/7 security operations center for threat detection and response.
data.technical_spec: Uses advanced SIEM tools for log analysis.
